final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    output reg [3:0] S
);always @(*) begin
    S = A + B;
    if (S > 15) begin
        S = S - 16;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      S = A - B; if (S < 0) begin S = S + 16; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: S = A - B; if (S < 0) begin S = S + 16; end
